executor_steps: In the COM component type annex, remove or replace the equation 'eq Mode: int = Agree_Nodes::Brake_Mode(Mode, Panel.LO, Panel.MED, Panel.MAX);'
In the COM component type annex, replace or remove the guarantee 'not Fail => CMD = Agree_Nodes::Brake_Cmd(Mode, Pedal);'
In the BSCU implementation annex, replace or remove the lemma 'COM1._CLK and not FailCOM1 => (COM1.CMD = Agree_Nodes::Brake_Cmd(COM1.Mode,Pedal));'
In the BSCU implementation annex, replace or remove the lemma 'COM2._CLK and not FailCOM2 => (COM2.CMD = Agree_Nodes::Brake_Cmd(COM2.Mode,Pedal));'
In the BSCU implementation annex, replace or remove the lemma 'MON1._CLK and not FailMON1 => (MON1.Status.Cmd = Agree_Nodes::Brake_Cmd(MON1.Mode,Pedal));'
In the BSCU implementation annex, replace or remove the lemma 'MON2._CLK and not FailMON2 => (MON2.Status.Cmd = Agree_Nodes::Brake_Cmd(MON2.Mode,Pedal));'
In the BSCU implementation annex, replace or remove the lemma '(MON1_Running and COM1_Running) => Agree_Nodes::Duration(MON1.Mode != COM1.Mode) < 7;'
In the BSCU implementation annex, replace or remove the lemma '(MON2_Running and COM2_Running) => Agree_Nodes::Duration(MON2.Mode != COM2.Mode) < 7;'
